title: WELLMAIL
subtitle: Python e-mail client
summary: A first serious software project: a Python e-mail client with a GUI, built as a team course project and remembered as an early step into real software construction.

blocks.text: The main lesson was not only the client itself. It was learning how to divide a graphical software system into modules and build something with a real interface flow.

items: Receive Box and Main Module ownership
One of the strongest projects in the class cohort
